info.title: Tapper.Generator
info.description: A Tool Transpiling C# Type into TypeScript Type. (Support JSON and MessagePack)

options.name: --eol
options.description: End of line (Default: Lf) (Allowed values: Lf, Crlf, Cr)

options.name: --asm
options.description: The flag whether to extend the transpile target to the referenced assembly.

options.name: --serializer
options.description: The output type will be suitable for the selected serializer. (Default: Json) (Allowed values: Json, MessagePack)

options.name: --naming-style
options.description: Naming style. If none is selected, the C# name is used as it is. (Default: CamelCase) (Allowed values: None, CamelCase, PascalCase)

options.name: --enum
options.description: Enum representation style (Default: Value) (Allowed values: Value, Name, NameCamel, NamePascal, Union, UnionCamel, UnionPascal)

options.name: --attr=<true
options.description: The flag whether attributes such as JsonPropertyName should affect transpilation. (Default: True)
